316 if (!allowIncomplete) {

320 }

323

327 } else if (module.scope->lookupLocal(alias) != target.symbol) {
328 if (!allowIncomplete) {
329 error(import.span, "Cannot import module '" + alias +

331 "the current file.");
332 }
333 continue;
334 }
335

337 bool isImplicitStdImport =
338 import.rawPath == "std/prelude" && import.moduleAlias.empty();
339 if (isImplicitStdImport) {
340 for (const auto &exported : target.symbol->exports) {
341 if (!module.scope->lookupLocal(exported.first)) {
342 module.scope->declare(exported.first, exported.second);
343 }
344 }
345 }
346
347 if (import.visibility == Visibility::Public) {
348 module.symbol->exports[alias] = target.symbol;

350 module.symbol->exports[exported.first] = exported.second;
351 }
352 }
353 continue;
354 }
355
356 if (import.targetModuleIds.size() != 1) {
357 if (!allowIncomplete) {
358 error(import.span, "Selective imports are only allowed when the path "
359 "resolves to a single module.");
360 }
361 continue;
362 }
363
364 for (const auto &binding : import.bindings) {
365 auto exportedIt = target.symbol->exports.find(binding.sourceName);
366 if (exportedIt == target.symbol->exports.end()) {
367 if (allowIncomplete) {
368 continue;
369 }
370 auto memberIt = target.symbol->members.find(binding.sourceName);
371 if (memberIt != target.symbol->members.end() &&
372 memberIt->second->visibility != Visibility::Public) {
373 error(import.span, "Member '" + binding.sourceName +
374 "' of module '" + alias + "' is private.");
375 } else {
376 error(import.span, "Module '" + alias + "' has no public member '" +
377 binding.sourceName + "'.");
378 }
379 continue;
380 }
381
382 auto existing = module.scope->lookupLocal(binding.localName);
383 if (existing && existing != exportedIt->second) {
384 if (!allowIncomplete) {
385 error(import.span, "Imported name '" + binding.localName +
386 "' conflicts with an existing declaration "
387 "in the current file.");
388 }
389 continue;
390 }
391 if (!existing) {
392 module.scope->declare(binding.localName, exportedIt->second);
393 }
394 if (import.visibility == Visibility::Public) {
395 module.symbol->exports[binding.localName] = exportedIt->second;
396 }
397 }
398 }

978 function.genericParameterNames.end(),
979 normalizedParamName) !=
980 function.genericParameterNames.end();

998 while (matchingArgClass &&

1000 cls->getGenericBaseName() !=
1001 matchingArgClass->getGenericBaseName())) {
1002 matchingArgClass = matchingArgClass->getBase();

1004 if (!matchingArgClass ||
1005 matchingArgClass->getGenericArguments().size() !=
1006 cls->getGenericArguments().size()) {
1007 return false;
1008 }
1009 for (size_t i = 0; i < cls->getGenericArguments().size(); ++i) {

1030 }
1031 return it->second->toString() == argType->toString();

1059 if (failureReason) {

1071 function.genericParameterNames.begin(),

736 retType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
737 }
738 if (!methodGenericBindings.empty()) {
739 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
740 }
741 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
742
743 if (!retType) {
744 retType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
745 }
746
747 if (methodDecl->isUnsafe_) {
748 --unsafeTypeContextDepth_;
749 }
750
751 auto methodSymbol = std::make_shared<FunctionSymbol>(
752 methodDecl->name_, std::move(params), std::move(retType), "",
753 moduleIt->second.info->moduleName, methodDecl->visibility_,
754 methodDecl->isUnsafe_);
755 for (const auto &genericParam : methodDecl->genericParams_) {
756 if (genericParam) {
757 methodSymbol->genericParameterNames.push_back(genericParam->typeName);
758 }
759 }
760 methodSymbol->isMethod = !methodDecl->isStatic_;
761 methodSymbol->isStatic = methodDecl->isStatic_;
762 methodSymbol->isConstructor = isCtor;
763 methodSymbol->isDestructor = isDtor;
764 methodSymbol->ownerTypeName = instantiatedClassType->getName();
765 if (methodSymbol->isMethod && !methodSymbol->isStatic &&
766 !methodSymbol->isConstructor && !methodSymbol->isDestructor) {
767 methodSymbol->vtableSlot =
768 findOverriddenVtableSlot(classInfo, *methodSymbol);
769 if (methodSymbol->vtableSlot < 0) {
770 methodSymbol->vtableSlot = classInfo.nextVirtualSlot++;
771 }
772 }
773 methodSymbol->linkName = mangleName(
774 moduleIt->second.info->linkPath.empty()
775 ? moduleIt->second.info->moduleId
776 : moduleIt->second.info->linkPath,
777 instantiatedClassType->getCodegenName() + "$" + methodDecl->name_ +
778 "$" + sanitizeTypeName(functionSignatureKey(*methodSymbol)));
779 functionDeclarationNodes_[methodSymbol.get()] = methodDecl.get();
780 functionDeclarationModuleIds_[methodSymbol.get()] =
781 moduleIt->second.info->moduleId;
782 functionGenericParamNames_[methodSymbol.get()] =
783 methodSymbol->genericParameterNames;
784 addClassMethodOverload(classInfo, methodSymbol);
785 if (isCtor) {
786 if (!classInfo.constructor) {
787 classInfo.constructor = methodSymbol;
788 }
789 } else if (isDtor) {
790 classInfo.destructor = methodSymbol;
791 }
792
793 if (!methodSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty() &&
794 !methodSymbol->isGenericInstantiation) {
795 continue;
796 }
797
798 auto oldScope = currentScope_;
799 auto oldFunction = currentFunction_;
800 auto oldModuleId = currentModuleId_;
801 auto oldClassStack = currentClassStack_;
802 int oldUnsafeDepth = unsafeDepth_;
803
804 currentModuleId_ = moduleIt->second.info->moduleId;
805 currentScope_ = moduleIt->second.scope;
806 currentFunction_ = methodSymbol;
807 currentClassStack_.push_back(instantiatedClassType->getName());
808 if (methodSymbol->isUnsafe) {
809 ++unsafeDepth_;
810 }
811
812 pushScope();
813 for (const auto &param : methodSymbol->parameters) {
814 if (!currentScope_->declare(param->name, param)) {
815 error(methodDecl->span,
816 "Parameter '" + param->name + "' already declared.");
817 }
818 }
819
820 activeGenericBindingsStack_.push_back(genericBindings);
821 auto boundBody = bindBody(methodDecl->body_.get(), false);
822 activeGenericBindingsStack_.pop_back();
823 popScope();
824
825 currentScope_ = oldScope;
826 currentFunction_ = oldFunction;
827 currentModuleId_ = oldModuleId;
828 currentClassStack_ = oldClassStack;
829 unsafeDepth_ = oldUnsafeDepth;
830
831 bool hasReturn = blockAlwaysReturns(boundBody.get());
832
833 if (!hasReturn &&
834 methodSymbol->returnType->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Void) {
835 auto kind = methodSymbol->returnType->getKind();
836 if (methodSymbol->returnType->isInteger() ||
837 kind == zir::TypeKind::Float || kind == zir::TypeKind::Bool) {
838 std::string litVal = "0";
839 if (kind == zir::TypeKind::Float)
840 litVal = "0.0";
841 else if (kind == zir::TypeKind::Bool)
842 litVal = "false";
843 auto lit =
844 std::make_unique<BoundLiteral>(litVal, methodSymbol->returnType);
845 boundBody->statements.push_back(
846 std::make_unique<BoundReturnStatement>(std::move(lit)));
847 }
848
849 _diag.report(methodDecl->span, zap::DiagnosticLevel::Warning,
850 "Function '" + methodDecl->name_ +
851 "' has non-void return type but no return on some "
852 "paths.");
853 }
854
855 boundRoot_->functions.push_back(
856 std::make_unique<BoundFunctionDeclaration>(methodSymbol,
857 std::move(boundBody)));
858 }
859
860 currentScope_ = oldScope;
861 currentModuleId_ = oldModuleId;
862
863 auto boundRecord = std::make_unique<BoundRecordDeclaration>();
864 boundRecord->type = instantiatedClassType;
865 boundRoot_->records.push_back(std::move(boundRecord));
866 }
867
868 return instantiatedSymbol;
869}

758 (symbol->hasExternC && symbol->externAbi == "C")) {
759 symbol->linkName = symbol->name;
760 }
761 auto existing = module.scope->lookupLocal(extDecl->name_);
762 if (findFunctionBySignature(existing, *symbol)) {
763 error(extDecl->span,
764 "External function '" + extDecl->name_ + "' already declared.");
765 continue;
766 }
767 auto overloads = module.scope->declareFunction(extDecl->name_, symbol);
768 if (!overloads) {
769 error(extDecl->span, "External function '" + extDecl->name_ +
770 "' conflicts with an existing declaration.");
771 continue;
772 }
773 declaredFunctionSymbols_[extDecl] = symbol;
774 module.symbol->members[extDecl->name_] = overloads;
775 if (extDecl->visibility_ == Visibility::Public) {
776 auto exportIt = module.symbol->exports.find(extDecl->name_);
777 std::shared_ptr<OverloadSetSymbol> exportSet;
778 if (exportIt == module.symbol->exports.end()) {
779 exportSet = std::make_shared<OverloadSetSymbol>(
780 extDecl->name_, module.info->moduleName, Visibility::Public);
781 module.symbol->exports[extDecl->name_] = exportSet;
782 } else {
783 exportSet =
784 std::dynamic_pointer_cast<OverloadSetSymbol>(exportIt->second);
785 }
786 if (!exportSet) {
787 error(extDecl->span, "External function '" + extDecl->name_ +
788 "' conflicts with an exported declaration.");
789 } else {
790 exportSet->addOverload(symbol);
791 }
792 }
793 } else if (auto varDecl = dynamic_cast<VarDecl *>(child.get())) {
794 if (!varDecl->isGlobal_) {
795 continue;
796 }
797 std::shared_ptr<zir::Type> type;
798 if (varDecl->type_) {
799 type = mapType(*varDecl->type_);
800 if (!type) {
801 error(varDecl->span,
802 "Unknown type: " + varDecl->type_->qualifiedName());
803 type = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
804 }
805 } else {
806 type = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
807 }
808 auto linkName = varDecl->isExternal_
809 ? varDecl->name_
810 : mangleName(module.info->linkPath.empty()
811 ? module.info->moduleId
812 : module.info->linkPath,
813 varDecl->name_);
814 auto symbol = std::make_shared<VariableSymbol>(
815 varDecl->name_, type, false, false, linkName, module.info->moduleName,
816 varDecl->visibility_);
817 symbol->is_external = varDecl->isExternal_;
818 if (!module.scope->declare(varDecl->name_, symbol)) {
819 error(varDecl->span,
820 "Variable '" + varDecl->name_ + "' already declared.");
821 }
822 module.symbol->members[varDecl->name_] = symbol;
823 if (varDecl->visibility_ == Visibility::Public) {
824 module.symbol->exports[varDecl->name_] = symbol;
825 }
826 } else if (auto constDecl = dynamic_cast<ConstDecl *>(child.get())) {
827 std::shared_ptr<zir::Type> type;
828 if (constDecl->type_) {
829 type = mapType(*constDecl->type_);
830 if (!type) {
831 error(constDecl->span,
832 "Unknown type: " + constDecl->type_->qualifiedName());
833 type = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
834 }
835 } else {
836 type = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
837 }
838 auto symbol = std::make_shared<VariableSymbol>(
839 constDecl->name_, type, true, false,
840 mangleName(module.info->linkPath.empty() ? module.info->moduleId
841 : module.info->linkPath,
842 constDecl->name_),
843 module.info->moduleName, constDecl->visibility_);
844 if (!module.scope->declare(constDecl->name_, symbol)) {
845 error(constDecl->span,
846 "Identifier '" + constDecl->name_ + "' already declared.");
847 }
848 module.symbol->members[constDecl->name_] = symbol;
849 if (constDecl->visibility_ == Visibility::Public) {
850 module.symbol->exports[constDecl->name_] = symbol;
851 }
852 }
853 }

1324 error(attr.span, "duplicate attribute 'packed'");
1325 continue;
1326 }
1327 if (attr.hasArguments()) {
1328 error(attr.span, "attribute 'packed' does not accept arguments");
1329 continue;
1330 }

1332 std::dynamic_pointer_cast<zir::RecordType>(symbol->type);
1333 if (!recordType || symbol->type->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Record) {
1334 error(attr.span,
1335 "attribute 'packed' can only be applied to record types");
1336 continue;
1337 }
1338 seenPacked = true;
1339 symbol->isPacked = true;
1340 recordType->isPacked = true;
1341 continue;
1342 }
1343
1344 if (attr.name == "extern" || attr.name == "noMangle") {
1345 error(attr.span, "attribute '" + attr.name +
1346 "' cannot be applied to type declarations");
1347 continue;
1348 }
1349 }
1350}

658 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundLiteral>("", typeSymbol->type));
659 } else if (auto moduleSymbol =
660 std::dynamic_pointer_cast<ModuleSymbol>(symbol)) {
661 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundModuleReference>(moduleSymbol));
662 } else if (auto overloadSet =
663 std::dynamic_pointer_cast<OverloadSetSymbol>(symbol)) {
664 // Function reference — resolve to a function pointer type
665 auto expected = currentExpectedExpressionType();
666 std::shared_ptr<FunctionSymbol> match;
667
668 if (expected && expected->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::FunctionPointer) {
669 const auto &fpType =
670 static_cast<const zir::FunctionPointerType &>(*expected);
671 for (const auto &overload : overloadSet->overloads) {
672 if (overload->parameters.size() == fpType.getParams().size()) {
673 bool ok = true;
674 for (size_t i = 0; i < fpType.getParams().size(); ++i) {
675 if (!canConvert(fpType.getParams()[i],
676 overload->parameters[i]->type)) {
677 ok = false;
678 break;
679 }
680 }
681 if (ok) {
682 match = overload;
683 break;
684 }
685 }
686 }
687 }
688 if (!match && !overloadSet->overloads.empty())
689 match = overloadSet->overloads.front();
690
691 if (match) {
692 // Build FunctionPointerType from the matched overload's signature
693 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<zir::Type>> params;
694 for (const auto &p : match->parameters)
695 params.push_back(p->type);
696 auto fpType = std::make_shared<zir::FunctionPointerType>(
697 std::move(params), match->returnType);
698 expressionStack_.push(
699 std::make_unique<BoundFunctionReference>(match, fpType));
700 return;
701 }
702 error(node.span, "'" + node.value_ + "' is not a variable or type.");
703 } else {
704 error(node.span, "'" + node.value_ + "' is not a variable or type.");
705 }
706}

1054 }
1055
1056 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> rawArgs;
1057 rawArgs.reserve(node.params_.size());
1058 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.params_.size(); ++i) {
1059 auto arg =
1060 bindExpressionWithExpected(node.params_[i]->value.get(), nullptr);
1061 if (!arg) {
1062 return;
1063 }
1064 rawArgs.push_back(std::move(arg));
1065 }
1066
1067 struct MethodCandidate {
1068 std::shared_ptr<FunctionSymbol> symbol;
1069 std::vector<int> cost;
1070 };
1071
1072 const bool calledOnType =
1073 dynamic_cast<BoundLiteral *>(selfExpr.get()) != nullptr;
1074 std::vector<MethodCandidate> matches;
1075 bool inaccessibleMatch = false;
1076 bool unsafeMatch = false;
1077
1078 for (auto funcSymbol : candidates) {
1079 if (!funcSymbol) {
1080 continue;
1081 }
1082
1083 if (funcSymbol->isMethod && calledOnType) {
1084 continue;
1085 }
1086
1087 bool methodAllowed =
1088 funcSymbol->visibility == Visibility::Public ||
1089 (!currentClassStack_.empty() &&
1090 currentClassStack_.back() == classType->getName()) ||
1091 (funcSymbol->visibility == Visibility::Protected &&
1092 !currentClassStack_.empty());
1093 if (!methodAllowed) {
1094 inaccessibleMatch = true;
1095 continue;
1096 }
1097 if (funcSymbol->isUnsafe && !isUnsafeActive()) {
1098 unsafeMatch = true;
1099 continue;
1100 }
1101
1102 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> inferenceArgs;
1103 if (funcSymbol->isMethod) {
1104 inferenceArgs.push_back(selfExpr->clone());
1105 }
1106 for (const auto &rawArg : rawArgs) {
1107 inferenceArgs.push_back(rawArg->clone());
1108 }
1109
1110 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::shared_ptr<zir::Type>>
1111 genericBindings;
1112 if (!funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty()) {
1113 genericBindings =
1114 buildGenericBindings(*funcSymbol, inferenceArgs,
1115 node.genericArgs_, node.span, nullptr);
1116 if (genericBindings.empty()) {
1117 continue;
1118 }
1119 funcSymbol = ensureGenericFunctionInstantiation(
1120 funcSymbol, orderedGenericBindings(genericBindings), node.span);
1121 if (!funcSymbol) {
1122 continue;
1123 }
1124 } else if (!node.genericArgs_.empty()) {
1125 continue;
1126 }
1127
1128 size_t paramOffset = funcSymbol->isMethod ? 1 : 0;
1129 if (node.params_.size() + paramOffset !=
1130 funcSymbol->parameters.size()) {
1131 continue;
1132 }
1133
1134 MethodCandidate match;
1135 match.symbol = funcSymbol;
1136 bool failed = false;
1137 for (size_t i = 0; i < rawArgs.size(); ++i) {
1138 auto expectedType = funcSymbol->parameters[i + paramOffset]->type;
1139 if (!canConvert(rawArgs[i]->type, expectedType)) {
1140 failed = true;
1141 break;
1142 }
1143 match.cost.push_back(conversionCost(rawArgs[i]->type, expectedType));
1144 }
1145 if (!failed) {
1146 matches.push_back(std::move(match));
1147 }
1148 }
1149
1150 if (matches.empty()) {
1151 if (inaccessibleMatch) {
1152 error(node.span,
1153 "Method '" + member->member_ + "' is not accessible.");
1154 } else if (unsafeMatch) {
1155 requireUnsafeContext(node.span, "unsafe function calls");
1156 } else {
1157 error(node.span,
1158 "No matching overload for method '" + member->member_ + "'.");
1159 }
1160 return;
1161 }
1162
1163 std::sort(matches.begin(), matches.end(),
1164 [](const MethodCandidate &lhs, const MethodCandidate &rhs) {
1165 return lhs.cost < rhs.cost;
1166 });
1167 if (matches.size() > 1 && matches[0].cost == matches[1].cost) {
1168 error(node.span,
1169 "Ambiguous overload for method '" + member->member_ + "'.");
1170 return;
1171 }
1172
1173 auto funcSymbol = matches.front().symbol;
1174 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> args;
1175 std::vector<bool> argIsRef;
1176 if (funcSymbol->isMethod) {
1177 args.push_back(std::move(selfExpr));
1178 argIsRef.push_back(false);
1179 }
1180
1181 size_t paramOffset = funcSymbol->isMethod ? 1 : 0;
1182 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.params_.size(); ++i) {
1183 auto arg = rawArgs[i]->clone();
1184 auto expectedType = funcSymbol->parameters[i + paramOffset]->type;
1185 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), expectedType);
1186 args.push_back(std::move(arg));
1187 argIsRef.push_back(node.params_[i]->isRef);
1188 }
1189
1190 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundFunctionCall>(
1191 funcSymbol, std::move(args), std::move(argIsRef)));
1192 return;
1193 }
1194 }
1195
1196 std::vector<std::string> calleeParts;
1197 if (!node.callee_ || !extractQualifiedPath(node.callee_.get(), calleeParts)) {
1198 // Try indirect call through function pointer
1199 if (node.callee_) {
1200 node.callee_->accept(*this);
1201 if (!expressionStack_.empty()) {
1202 auto calleeExpr = std::move(expressionStack_.top());
1203 expressionStack_.pop();
1204 if (calleeExpr->type &&
1205 calleeExpr->type->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::FunctionPointer) {
1206 const auto &fpType =
1207 static_cast<const zir::FunctionPointerType &>(*calleeExpr->type);
1208 if (node.params_.size() != fpType.getParams().size()) {
1209 error(node.span, "Function pointer call argument count mismatch.");
1210 return;
1211 }
1212 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> args;
1213 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.params_.size(); ++i) {
1214 auto arg = bindExpressionWithExpected(node.params_[i]->value.get(),
1215 fpType.getParams()[i]);
1216 if (!arg)
1217 return;
1218 args.push_back(std::move(arg));
1219 }
1220 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundIndirectCall>(
1221 std::move(calleeExpr), std::move(args), fpType.getReturnType()));
1222 return;
1223 }
1224 }
1225 }
1226 error(node.span, "Only direct function calls are supported.");
1227 return;
1228 }
1229
1230 auto symbol =
1231 resolveQualifiedSymbol(calleeParts, node.span, SymbolKind::Function);
1232 if (!symbol) {
1233 // Check if it's a variable holding a function pointer
1234 auto varSym =
1235 resolveQualifiedSymbol(calleeParts, node.span, SymbolKind::Variable);
1236 if (varSym && varSym->getKind() == SymbolKind::Variable) {
1237 auto varSymbol = std::static_pointer_cast<VariableSymbol>(varSym);
1238 if (varSymbol->type &&
1239 varSymbol->type->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::FunctionPointer) {
1240 const auto &fpType =
1241 static_cast<const zir::FunctionPointerType &>(*varSymbol->type);
1242 if (node.params_.size() != fpType.getParams().size()) {
1243 error(node.span, "Function pointer call argument count mismatch.");
1244 return;
1245 }
1246 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> args;
1247 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.params_.size(); ++i) {
1248 auto arg = bindExpressionWithExpected(node.params_[i]->value.get(),
1249 fpType.getParams()[i]);
1250 if (!arg)
1251 return;
1252 args.push_back(std::move(arg));
1253 }
1254 auto calleeExpr = std::make_unique<BoundVariableExpression>(varSymbol);
1255 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundIndirectCall>(
1256 std::move(calleeExpr), std::move(args), fpType.getReturnType()));
1257 return;
1258 }
1259 }
1260 return;
1261 }
1262
1263 auto candidates = collectOverloads(symbol);
1264 if (candidates.empty()) {
1265 error(node.span, "'" + calleeParts.back() + "' is not a function.");
1266 return;
1267 }
1268
1269 bool seenSpreadArg = false;
1270 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> rawArgs;
1271 std::vector<bool> rawArgIsRef;
1272 std::vector<bool> rawArgIsSpread;
1273 std::vector<std::string> rawArgNames;
1274 for (size_t i = 0; i < node.params_.size(); ++i) {
1275 if (seenSpreadArg) {
1276 error(node.params_[i]->value->span,
1277 "Spread argument must be the last argument in a function call.");
1278 return;
1279 }
1280
1281 auto arg =
1282 bindExpressionWithExpected(node.params_[i]->value.get(), nullptr);
1283 if (!arg)
1284 return;
1285 rawArgNames.push_back(node.params_[i]->name);
1286 rawArgIsRef.push_back(node.params_[i]->isRef);
1287 rawArgIsSpread.push_back(node.params_[i]->isSpread);
1288 if (node.params_[i]->isSpread) {
1289 seenSpreadArg = true;
1290 }
1291 rawArgs.push_back(std::move(arg));
1292 }
1293
1294 struct CandidateMatch {
1295 std::shared_ptr<FunctionSymbol> symbol;
1296 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> arguments;
1297 std::vector<bool> argumentIsRef;
1298 std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression> variadicPack;
1299 std::vector<int> cost;
1300 bool usedExtraArguments = false;
1301 int returnCost = 0;
1302 std::vector<std::string> notes;
1303 };
1304
1305 auto compareCost = [](const CandidateMatch &lhs, const CandidateMatch &rhs) {
1306 if (lhs.cost != rhs.cost) {
1307 return lhs.cost < rhs.cost;
1308 }
1309 if (lhs.returnCost != rhs.returnCost) {
1310 return lhs.returnCost < rhs.returnCost;
1311 }
1312 if (lhs.usedExtraArguments != rhs.usedExtraArguments) {
1313 return !lhs.usedExtraArguments && rhs.usedExtraArguments;
1314 }
1315 if (lhs.symbol->acceptsExtraArguments() !=
1316 rhs.symbol->acceptsExtraArguments()) {
1317 return !lhs.symbol->acceptsExtraArguments() &&
1318 rhs.symbol->acceptsExtraArguments();
1319 }
1320 return false;
1321 };
1322
1323 std::vector<CandidateMatch> matches;
1324 std::shared_ptr<FunctionSymbol> blockedUnsafeMatch = nullptr;
1325 std::vector<std::string> rejectionNotes;
1326 auto expectedReturnType = currentExpectedExpressionType();
1327
1328 for (const auto &funcSymbol : candidates) {
1329 if (!funcSymbol) {
1330 continue;
1331 }
1332
1333 size_t fixedParamCount = funcSymbol->fixedParameterCount();
1334 bool hasExplicitTypeArgs = !node.genericArgs_.empty();
1335 if (hasExplicitTypeArgs &&
1336 node.genericArgs_.size() > funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.size()) {
1337 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
1338 "': explicit generic argument count mismatch");
1339 continue;
1340 }
1341
1342 if (!hasExplicitTypeArgs && !funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty()) {
1343 // inference is allowed; no early rejection
1344 }
1345 if (!funcSymbol->acceptsExtraArguments() &&
1346 node.params_.size() != funcSymbol->parameters.size()) {
1347 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
1348 "': wrong argument count");
1349 continue;
1350 }
1351 if (funcSymbol->acceptsExtraArguments() &&
1352 node.params_.size() < fixedParamCount) {
1353 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
1354 "': too few arguments");
1355 continue;
1356 }
1357
1358 CandidateMatch match;
1359 match.symbol = funcSymbol;
1360 match.arguments.resize(fixedParamCount);
1361 match.argumentIsRef.resize(fixedParamCount, false);
1362 std::string genericBindingFailure;
1363 auto genericBindings =
1364 buildGenericBindings(*funcSymbol, rawArgs, node.genericArgs_, node.span,
1365 &genericBindingFailure);
1366 if (!funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty() && genericBindings.empty()) {
1367 rejectionNotes.push_back(
1368 "'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) + "': " +
1369 (genericBindingFailure.empty() ? "generic type binding failed"
1370 : genericBindingFailure));
1371 continue;
1372 }
1373 bool failed = false;
1374 std::string failureReason;
1375 auto variadicParam = funcSymbol->variadicParameter();
1376 std::vector<int> positionalToParameter(rawArgs.size(), -1);
1377 std::vector<bool> parameterAssigned(funcSymbol->parameters.size(), false);
1378 bool seenNamedArgument = false;
1379
1380 for (size_t i = 0, positionalIndex = 0; i < rawArgs.size(); ++i) {
1381 const bool isSpread = rawArgIsSpread[i];
1382 const bool isNamed = !rawArgNames[i].empty();
1383
1384 if (isSpread) {
1385 if (isNamed) {
1386 failed = true;
1387 failureReason = "named spread arguments are not supported";
1388 break;
1389 }
1390 positionalToParameter[i] = static_cast<int>(fixedParamCount);
1391 continue;
1392 }
1393
1394 if (isNamed) {
1395 seenNamedArgument = true;
1396 bool found = false;
1397 for (size_t paramIndex = 0; paramIndex < fixedParamCount;
1398 ++paramIndex) {
1399 if (funcSymbol->parameters[paramIndex]->name != rawArgNames[i]) {
1400 continue;
1401 }
1402 if (parameterAssigned[paramIndex]) {
1403 failed = true;
1404 failureReason =
1405 "parameter '" + rawArgNames[i] + "' provided more than once";
1406 break;
1407 }
1408 positionalToParameter[i] = static_cast<int>(paramIndex);
1409 parameterAssigned[paramIndex] = true;
1410 found = true;
1411 break;
1412 }
1413 if (failed) {
1414 break;
1415 }
1416 if (!found) {
1417 failed = true;
1418 failureReason = "unknown named argument '" + rawArgNames[i] + "'";
1419 break;
1420 }
1421 continue;
1422 }
1423
1424 if (seenNamedArgument) {
1425 failed = true;
1426 failureReason = "positional arguments cannot follow named arguments";
1427 break;
1428 }
1429
1430 while (positionalIndex < fixedParamCount &&
1431 parameterAssigned[positionalIndex]) {
1432 ++positionalIndex;
1433 }
1434
1435 if (positionalIndex < fixedParamCount) {
1436 positionalToParameter[i] = static_cast<int>(positionalIndex);
1437 parameterAssigned[positionalIndex] = true;
1438 ++positionalIndex;
1439 } else {
1440 positionalToParameter[i] = static_cast<int>(fixedParamCount);
1441 }
1442 }
1443
1444 if (!failed) {
1445 for (size_t paramIndex = 0; paramIndex < fixedParamCount; ++paramIndex) {
1446 if (!parameterAssigned[paramIndex]) {
1447 failed = true;
1448 failureReason = "missing argument for parameter '" +
1449 funcSymbol->parameters[paramIndex]->name + "'";
1450 break;
1451 }
1452 }
1453 }
1454
1455 for (size_t i = 0; i < rawArgs.size(); ++i) {
1456 auto arg = rawArgs[i]->clone();
1457 bool argIsRef = rawArgIsRef[i];
1458 bool argIsSpread = rawArgIsSpread[i];
1459 int parameterIndex = positionalToParameter[i];
1460
1461 if (failed) {
1462 break;
1463 }
1464
1465 if (argIsSpread) {
1466 if (parameterIndex < static_cast<int>(fixedParamCount) || argIsRef ||
1467 !funcSymbol->hasVariadicParameter()) {
1468 failed = true;
1469 failureReason =
1470 "spread arguments can only target a Zap variadic parameter";
1471 break;
1472 }
1473
1474 if (!variadicParam || !variadicParam->variadic_element_type) {
1475 failed = true;
1476 failureReason = "internal error: missing variadic parameter type";
1477 break;
1478 }
1479
1480 auto expectedViewType =
1481 makeVariadicViewType(variadicParam->variadic_element_type);
1482
1483 if (arg->type && arg->type->getKind() == zir::TypeKind::Array) {
1484 if (!canConvert(arg->type, expectedViewType)) {
1485 failed = true;
1486 failureReason =
1487 "spread argument type does not match variadic parameter";
1488 break;
1489 }
1490 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), expectedViewType);
1491 } else if (!arg->type || !isVariadicViewType(arg->type) ||
1492 !canConvert(arg->type, expectedViewType)) {
1493 failed = true;
1494 failureReason =
1495 "spread argument type does not match variadic parameter";
1496 break;
1497 }
1498
1499 match.variadicPack = std::move(arg);
1500 match.usedExtraArguments = true;
1501 match.notes.push_back("spread -> variadic pack");
1502 continue;
1503 }
1504
1505 if (parameterIndex >= 0 &&
1506 parameterIndex < static_cast<int>(fixedParamCount)) {
1507 auto expectedType = funcSymbol->parameters[parameterIndex]->type;
1508 if (!genericBindings.empty()) {
1509 expectedType = substituteGenericType(expectedType, genericBindings);
1510 }
1511 const auto &parameter = funcSymbol->parameters[parameterIndex];
1512 if (argIsRef != parameter->is_ref) {
1513 failed = true;
1514 failureReason = "argument for parameter '" + parameter->name +
1515 "' has mismatched ref-ness";
1516 break;
1517 }
1518
1519 if (argIsRef) {
1520 auto varExpr = dynamic_cast<BoundVariableExpression *>(arg.get());
1521 if (!varExpr || arg->type->toString() != expectedType->toString()) {
1522 failed = true;
1523 failureReason = "ref argument for parameter '" + parameter->name +
1524 "' must exactly match type '" +
1525 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'";
1526 break;
1527 }
1528 match.cost.push_back(0);
1529 match.notes.push_back("param " + parameter->name +
1530 ": exact ref match");
1531 } else if (!canConvert(arg->type, expectedType)) {
1532 failed = true;
1533 failureReason = "argument for parameter '" + parameter->name +
1534 "' is not convertible from '" +
1535 renderTypeForUser(arg->type) + "' to '" +
1536 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'";
1537 break;
1538 } else {
1539 int cost = conversionCost(arg->type, expectedType);
1540 if (cost >= 1000) {
1541 failed = true;
1542 failureReason = "argument for parameter '" + parameter->name +
1543 "' is not convertible from '" +
1544 renderTypeForUser(arg->type) + "' to '" +
1545 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'";
1546 break;
1547 }
1548 match.cost.push_back(cost);
1549 match.notes.push_back("param " + parameter->name + ": " +
1550 describeConversion(arg->type, expectedType));
1551 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), expectedType);
1552 }
1553 match.argumentIsRef[parameterIndex] = argIsRef;
1554 match.arguments[parameterIndex] = std::move(arg);
1555 } else if (funcSymbol->hasVariadicParameter()) {
1556 if (argIsRef) {
1557 failed = true;
1558 failureReason = "variadic arguments cannot be passed by ref";
1559 break;
1560 }
1561 auto expectedType = variadicParam->variadic_element_type;
1562 if (!genericBindings.empty()) {
1563 expectedType = substituteGenericType(expectedType, genericBindings);
1564 }
1565 if (!canConvert(arg->type, expectedType)) {
1566 failed = true;
1567 failureReason = "variadic argument is not convertible from '" +
1568 renderTypeForUser(arg->type) + "' to '" +
1569 renderTypeForUser(expectedType) + "'";
1570 break;
1571 }
1572 int cost = conversionCost(arg->type, expectedType);
1573 match.cost.push_back(cost);
1574 match.usedExtraArguments = true;
1575 match.notes.push_back("variadic: " +
1576 describeConversion(arg->type, expectedType));
1577 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), expectedType);
1578 match.argumentIsRef.push_back(false);
1579 match.arguments.push_back(std::move(arg));
1580 } else if (funcSymbol->isCVariadic) {
1581 if (argIsRef) {
1582 failed = true;
1583 failureReason = "C variadic arguments cannot be passed by ref";
1584 break;
1585 }
1586 auto promotedType = getCVariadicArgumentType(arg->type);
1587 if (!promotedType) {
1588 failed = true;
1589 failureReason = "type '" + renderTypeForUser(arg->type) +
1590 "' is not supported in C variadic arguments";
1591 break;
1592 }
1593 int cost = conversionCost(arg->type, promotedType);
1594 match.cost.push_back(cost);
1595 match.usedExtraArguments = true;
1596 match.notes.push_back("c variadic: " +
1597 describeConversion(arg->type, promotedType));
1598 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), promotedType);
1599 match.argumentIsRef.push_back(false);
1600 match.arguments.push_back(std::move(arg));
1601 } else {
1602 failed = true;
1603 failureReason = "too many arguments";
1604 break;
1605 }
1606 }
1607
1608 if (failed) {
1609 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
1610 "': " + failureReason);
1611 continue;
1612 }
1613
1614 if (expectedReturnType) {
1615 if (funcSymbol->returnType->toString() ==
1616 expectedReturnType->toString()) {
1617 match.returnCost = 0;
1618 match.notes.push_back("return: exact match");
1619 } else if (canConvert(funcSymbol->returnType, expectedReturnType)) {
1620 match.returnCost =
1621 conversionCost(funcSymbol->returnType, expectedReturnType);
1622 match.notes.push_back(
1623 "return: " +
1624 describeConversion(funcSymbol->returnType, expectedReturnType));
1625 } else {
1626 match.returnCost = 50;
1627 match.notes.push_back("return: incompatible with expected " +
1628 renderTypeForUser(expectedReturnType));
1629 }
1630 }
1631
1632 std::shared_ptr<FunctionSymbol> resolvedSymbol = funcSymbol;
1633 if (!funcSymbol->genericParameterNames.empty()) {
1634 resolvedSymbol = ensureGenericFunctionInstantiation(
1635 funcSymbol, orderedGenericBindings(genericBindings), node.span);
1636 if (!resolvedSymbol) {
1637 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*funcSymbol) +
1638 "': failed to instantiate generic function");
1639 continue;
1640 }
1641
1642 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<BoundExpression>> remappedArgs;
1643 std::vector<bool> remappedRef;
1644 remappedArgs.reserve(match.arguments.size());
1645 remappedRef.reserve(match.argumentIsRef.size());
1646
1647 for (size_t i = 0; i < match.arguments.size(); ++i) {
1648 auto argClone =
1649 match.arguments[i] ? match.arguments[i]->clone() : nullptr;
1650 if (i < resolvedSymbol->parameters.size() && argClone) {
1651 auto expected = resolvedSymbol->parameters[i]->type;
1652 if (!resolvedSymbol->parameters[i]->is_ref) {
1653 argClone = wrapInCast(std::move(argClone), expected);
1654 }
1655 }
1656 remappedArgs.push_back(std::move(argClone));
1657 remappedRef.push_back(
1658 i < match.argumentIsRef.size() ? match.argumentIsRef[i] : false);
1659 }
1660
1661 match.arguments = std::move(remappedArgs);
1662 match.argumentIsRef = std::move(remappedRef);
1663 match.symbol = resolvedSymbol;
1664 }
1665
1666 if (resolvedSymbol->isUnsafe && !isUnsafeActive()) {
1667 blockedUnsafeMatch = resolvedSymbol;
1668 rejectionNotes.push_back("'" + renderFunctionSignature(*resolvedSymbol) +
1669 "': requires unsafe context");
1670 continue;
1671 }
1672 matches.push_back(std::move(match));
1673 }
1674
1675 if (matches.empty()) {
1676 if (blockedUnsafeMatch) {
1677 requireUnsafeContext(node.span, "unsafe function calls");
1678 return;
1679 }
1680
1681 error(
1682 node.callee_->span,
1683 "No matching overload for function '" + calleeParts.back() + "'. " +
1684 (rejectionNotes.empty() ? std::string() : ("Candidates: " + [&]() {
1685 std::string details;
1686 for (size_t i = 0; i < rejectionNotes.size(); ++i) {
1687 if (i != 0) {
1688 details += "; ";
1689 }
1690 details += rejectionNotes[i];
1691 }
1692 return details;
1693 }())));
1694 return;
1695 }
1696
1697 size_t bestIndex = 0;
1698 for (size_t i = 1; i < matches.size(); ++i) {
1699 if (compareCost(matches[i], matches[bestIndex])) {
1700 bestIndex = i;
1701 }
1702 }
1703
1704 std::vector<size_t> ambiguous = {bestIndex};
1705 for (size_t i = 0; i < matches.size(); ++i) {
1706 if (i == bestIndex) {
1707 continue;
1708 }
1709 if (!compareCost(matches[i], matches[bestIndex]) &&
1710 !compareCost(matches[bestIndex], matches[i])) {
1711 ambiguous.push_back(i);
1712 }
1713 }
1714
1715 if (ambiguous.size() > 1) {
1716 std::string message =
1717 "Call to function '" + calleeParts.back() + "' is ambiguous between ";
1718 for (size_t i = 0; i < ambiguous.size(); ++i) {
1719 if (i != 0) {
1720 message += i + 1 == ambiguous.size() ? " and " : ", ";
1721 }
1722 message +=
1723 "'" + renderFunctionSignature(*matches[ambiguous[i]].symbol) + "'";
1724 }
1725 message += ".";
1726 if (expectedReturnType) {
1727 message +=
1728 " Expected result type: '" + expectedReturnType->toString() + "'.";
1729 }
1730 message += " Candidate details: ";
1731 for (size_t i = 0; i < ambiguous.size(); ++i) {
1732 if (i != 0) {
1733 message += "; ";
1734 }
1735 message +=
1736 "'" + renderFunctionSignature(*matches[ambiguous[i]].symbol) + "' [";
1737 for (size_t j = 0; j < matches[ambiguous[i]].notes.size(); ++j) {
1738 if (j != 0) {
1739 message += ", ";
1740 }
1741 message += matches[ambiguous[i]].notes[j];
1742 }
1743 message += "]";
1744 }
1745 error(node.callee_->span, message);
1746 return;
1747 }
1748
1749 auto &best = matches[bestIndex];
1750 expressionStack_.push(std::make_unique<BoundFunctionCall>(
1751 best.symbol, std::move(best.arguments), std::move(best.argumentIsRef),
1752 std::move(best.variadicPack)));
1753}

975 if (!block)
976 return;

978 if (auto *ret =
979 dynamic_cast<const BoundReturnStatement *>(stmt.get())) {

988 } else if (auto *whileStmt =
989 dynamic_cast<const BoundWhileStatement *>(
990 stmt.get())) {
991 collectReturns(whileStmt->body.get());
992 }
993 }
994 };

996
997 if (returnTypes.empty()) {
998 symbol->returnType =
999 std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void);
1000 } else {
1001 auto inferred = returnTypes[0];
1002 bool conflict = false;
1003 for (size_t i = 1; i < returnTypes.size(); ++i) {
1004 if (!canConvert(returnTypes[i], inferred) &&
1005 !canConvert(inferred, returnTypes[i])) {
1006 error(node.span, "Cannot infer return type of function '" +
1007 node.name_ + "': conflicting return types '" +

1012 break;
1013 }
1014 if (canConvert(inferred, returnTypes[i])) {
1015 inferred = returnTypes[i];
1016 }
1017 }

1019 conflict ? std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Void)
1020 : inferred;
1021 }
1022 }
1023
1024 bool hasReturn = blockAlwaysReturns(boundBody.get());
1025
1026 if (!hasReturn && symbol->linkName == "main" &&
1027 symbol->returnType->isInteger()) {
1028 auto intType = std::make_shared<zir::PrimitiveType>(zir::TypeKind::Int);
1029 auto lit = std::make_unique<BoundLiteral>("0", intType);
1030 boundBody->statements.push_back(
1031 std::make_unique<BoundReturnStatement>(std::move(lit)));
1032 hasReturn = true;
1033 }
1034
1035 if (!hasReturn && symbol->returnType->getKind() != zir::TypeKind::Void) {
1036 auto kind = symbol->returnType->getKind();
1037 if (symbol->returnType->isInteger() || kind == zir::TypeKind::Float ||
1038 kind == zir::TypeKind::Bool) {
1039 std::string litVal = "0";
1040 if (kind == zir::TypeKind::Float)
1041 litVal = "0.0";
1042 else if (kind == zir::TypeKind::Bool)
1043 litVal = "false";

1045 boundBody->statements.push_back(
1046 std::make_unique<BoundReturnStatement>(std::move(lit)));
1047 }

1853 auto arg = bindExpressionWithExpected(node.args_[i]->value.get(), nullptr);
1854 if (!arg) {
1855 return;
1856 }
1857 rawArgs.push_back(std::move(arg));

1863 ? std::vector<std::shared_ptr<FunctionSymbol>>{}
1864 : collectOverloads(ctorIt->second);
1865 if (ctorCandidates.empty() && ctor) {
1866 ctorCandidates.push_back(ctor);

1870 std::shared_ptr<FunctionSymbol> symbol;
1871 std::vector<int> cost;
1872 };
1873
1874 std::vector<ConstructorCandidate> matches;

1876 if (!node.args_.empty()) {
1877 error(node.span, "Constructor for class '" + concreteType->getName() +
1878 "' expects 0 arguments, got " +
1879 std::to_string(node.args_.size()) + ".");
1880 return;
1881 }
1882 } else {
1883 for (const auto &candidate : ctorCandidates) {
1884 if (!candidate) {
1885 continue;
1886 }
1887 size_t ctorParamOffset = candidate->isMethod ? 1 : 0;
1888 if (node.args_.size() + ctorParamOffset != candidate->parameters.size()) {
1889 continue;
1890 }
1891
1892 ConstructorCandidate match;
1893 match.symbol = candidate;
1894 bool failed = false;
1895 for (size_t i = 0; i < rawArgs.size(); ++i) {
1896 auto expected = candidate->parameters[i + ctorParamOffset]->type;
1897 if (!canConvert(rawArgs[i]->type, expected)) {
1898 failed = true;
1899 break;
1900 }
1901 match.cost.push_back(conversionCost(rawArgs[i]->type, expected));

1903 if (!failed) {
1904 matches.push_back(std::move(match));

1913
1914 std::sort(
1915 matches.begin(), matches.end(),
1916 [](const ConstructorCandidate &lhs, const ConstructorCandidate &rhs) {
1917 return lhs.cost < rhs.cost;
1918 });
1919 if (matches.size() > 1 && matches[0].cost == matches[1].cost) {
1920 error(node.span, "Ambiguous constructor for class '" +
1921 concreteType->getName() + "'.");
1922 return;

1924
1925 ctor = matches.front().symbol;
1926 }
1927
1928 size_t ctorParamOffset = ctor && ctor->isMethod ? 1 : 0;
1929 for (size_t i = 0; i < rawArgs.size(); ++i) {
1930 auto arg = rawArgs[i]->clone();
1931 auto expected =
1932 ctor ? ctor->parameters[i + ctorParamOffset]->type : nullptr;
1933 if (expected) {
1934 arg = wrapInCast(std::move(arg), expected);
1935 }
